humanSummary: # Role Report: TASK-TEAM-0083 ## Team Role: Lieutenant **Status:** UNABLE TO EXECUTE ### Constraint Analysis 1. **Authority Limitation** - Lieutenant role requires subordinate execution authority within task hierarchy - Current constraints prevent task runner invocation and role coordination - Cannot exceed or assume Coordinator authority per directive 2. **System Access Gaps** - No access to task management systems - No role-coordinator function invocation capability
